subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the One Who is Remembered unto her who hath believed in God, the Single One, the All-Informed. O My handmaiden! We have hearkened unto thy call and have answered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور الی التی آمنت بالله الفرد الخبیر یا امتی قد سمعنا ندائک و اجبناک
